business_domains.name: Customer Data Management
business_domains.description: Capture, store, and submit customer personal information including identity, address, and banking details.

capabilities.name: Personal Identity Capture
capabilities.description: Collect and hold first name, last name, date of birth, and gender.

capabilities.name: Address Data Capture
capabilities.description: Collect and hold street, postal code (PLZ), and city (Ort).

capabilities.name: Banking Data Capture
capabilities.description: Collect and hold IBAN, BIC, and valid-from date for payment details.

capabilities.name: Customer Data Submission
capabilities.description: Serialise all captured data and submit to a backend HTTP endpoint.
capabilities.coverage_notes: Only submits to HTTPBin echo service; real backend not implemented.

business_domains.name: UI / Presentation
business_domains.description: Render forms, gather user input, and display results.

capabilities.name: Form Rendering
capabilities.description: Display structured input form with German-locale labels.

capabilities.name: Real-Time Data Binding
capabilities.description: Synchronise UI input fields with the underlying data model on every change.

capabilities.name: Response Display
capabilities.description: Show server response data in the form's text area after submission.

business_domains.name: Real-Time Communication
business_domains.description: Receive and display server-pushed data over WebSocket connections.

capabilities.name: WebSocket Connection Management
capabilities.description: Connect to, maintain, and close WebSocket connections with lifecycle event handling.

capabilities.name: Server-Pushed Message Routing
capabilities.description: Route incoming WebSocket messages to the correct UI component based on message target field.

capabilities.name: WebSocket Broadcast
capabilities.description: Node.js server broadcasts messages to all connected WebSocket clients.

business_domains.name: Event-Driven State Management
business_domains.description: Notify UI components of model state changes using an event bus.

capabilities.name: Event Publication
capabilities.description: Emit typed string events from the model to registered listeners.

capabilities.name: Event Subscription
capabilities.description: Register handlers to respond to model events.

gaps.description: No validation capability exists. Fields like IBAN, BIC, date of birth, and ZIP code accept any string without format validation.
No capability to display error messages to the user when HTTP calls fail.
No authentication, authorisation, or data encryption capability.
No local data persistence; form data is only in-memory.
